holdings.infoBox: ONEO is an equity ETF with a total of 905 individual holdings. The top holdings are Western Digital stock at 2.69%, Micron Technology at 1.47%, Flex Ltd. at 1.31%, Dell Technologies at 0.92%, and Monolithic Power Systems at 0.83%.

overview.description: The State Street SPDR Russell 1000 Momentum Focus ETF (ONEO) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund tracks an index of large-cap stocks from the Russell 1000 Index, selected and weighted by four factors (value, quality, small size and momentum) that are scaled by market cap. ONEO was launched on Dec 2, 2015 and is issued by State Street.
